data.content: Approved in implementation review. Diff is limited to src/components/beat-detail-lightbox.tsx and src/lib/__tests__/beat-detail-lightbox-width.test.ts. Header layout now uses a two-column grid with an auto-width Close button track, and the title editor input is chrome-less via appearance-none, border-0, transparent background, no ring, and no shadow. Sanity gates in /Users/cartine/foolery-6a0d: bun run lint (passes with one pre-existing warning in src/components/beat-form.tsx:368 for react-hooks/incompatible-library), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build. Playwright verification on http://localhost:3001/beats confirmed the inline title editor remained focused with a visible caret, occupied ~92.9% of the header row width, did not overlap the Close button, and preserved a ~12.74px gap while reporting 0px borders, transparent background, appearance none, and no visible outline/ring chrome.
